name: The Jinx: The Life and Deaths of Robert Durst
original_name: The Jinx: The Life and Deaths of Robert Durst
overview: Robert Durst, scion of NY's billionaire real-estate family, has been accused of three murders but has evaded justice for over 30 years. Durst speaks in this true crime series, revealing secrets of a case that has baffled authorities.

trailers.title: The Jinx: The Life and Deaths of Robert Durst - Trailer - Official HBO UK
